flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at St. Francis College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 1.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St. Francis College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.0k → $16.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St. Francis College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at St. Francis College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (30.6% → 36.6%).
